description: Register USA₮ FeeCurrencyWrapper as gas currency with SortedOracles (oracle) and intrinsicGas matching USDT (CGP-0230). Requires Mento governance prerequisite MGP-17: SortedOracles.setEquivalentToken(USA₮ wrapper, cUSD).
Add USA₮ FeeCurrencyWrapper to FeeHandler with the canonical UniswapFeeHandlerSeller as handler.

Register XAU₮0 FeeWrapper as gas currency with SortedOracles (oracle) and intrinsicGas matching USDT. Requires Mento governance prerequisite MGP-17: addOracle + setTokenReportExpiry + setEquivalentToken(XAU₮0 wrapper, CELO/XAUt rateFeedId).
Add XAU₮0 FeeWrapper to FeeHandler with the canonical UniswapFeeHandlerSeller as handler.
